compiled_state.title: Write RED tests for --truncate mode (SC-6)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Extend tests/unit/scripts/test-apply-attribution-trailers.sh with three failing tests: test_truncate_clears_populated_jsonl_to_zero_bytes() (echo test >> JSONL; apply... --truncate; wc -c < JSONL equals 0), test_truncate_exits_0_when_jsonl_absent() (rm -f JSONL; apply... --truncate; test $? -eq 0), test_truncate_emits_warning_and_exits_0_on_truncation_failure() (SC-6 failure path: make JSONL unwritable e.g. ARTIFACTS_DIR=/dev or chmod 000 the file; apply... --truncate; test $? -eq 0 && 2>&1 | grep -i warning). Tests fail (RED). TDD exemption: test-writing task.
